ov_overview_body.en: Six Flags Fiesta Texas is the most unique and visually spectacular theme park in Texas, located in San Antonio inside a dramatic limestone quarry. Home to Iron Rattler, Superman Krypton Coaster, Wonder Woman Golden Lasso Coaster and Poltergeist.
ov_overview_body.es: Six Flags Fiesta Texas es el parque tematico mas unico de Texas en San Antonio dentro de una cantera de caliza. Hogar de Iron Rattler, Superman Krypton y Wonder Woman.
ov_overview_body.fr: Six Flags Fiesta Texas est le parc le plus unique du Texas a San Antonio dans une carriere de calcaire. Domine par Iron Rattler, Superman Krypton et Wonder Woman.
ov_overview_body.de: Six Flags Fiesta Texas ist der einzigartigste Park in Texas in San Antonio in einem Kalksteinbruch. Heimat von Iron Rattler, Superman Krypton und Wonder Woman.
ov_overview_body.it: Six Flags Fiesta Texas e il parco piu unico del Texas a San Antonio in una cava di calcare. Casa di Iron Rattler, Superman Krypton e Wonder Woman.
ov_overview_body.nl: Six Flags Fiesta Texas is het meest unieke park in Texas in San Antonio in een kalksteengroeve. Thuis van Iron Rattler, Superman Krypton en Wonder Woman.
ov_overview_body.pt: Six Flags Fiesta Texas e o parque mais unico do Texas em San Antonio dentro de uma pedreira de calcario. Lar de Iron Rattler, Superman Krypton e Wonder Woman.
ov_overview_body.ru: Six Flags Fiesta Texas — уникальный парк в Карьере в Сан-Антонио. Дом Iron Rattler и Superman Krypton.
ov_overview_body.zh: 六旗山姆尔希拉塔大冒险乐园是干芒圆石矿坑中最独特的公园。拥有Iron Rattler和Superman Krypton。
ov_overview_body.ar: سيكس فلاجز فييستا تيكساس في محجر حجر جيري. موطن Iron Rattler.

ov_highlights_body.en: Iron Rattler is consistently voted one of the greatest hybrid coasters in the world. Superman Krypton delivers six inversions over the quarry landscape. Wonder Woman was the first single-rail coaster ever built. Poltergeist launches from 0 to 107 km/h in 3.8 seconds. Sky Screamer swings at the top of the quarry wall with extraordinary views. JW Marriott Hill Country is the most spectacular resort in Texas.
ov_highlights_body.es: Iron Rattler es uno de los mejores coasters hibridos. Superman Krypton ofrece seis inversiones. Wonder Woman fue el primer coaster de riel unico. Poltergeist lanza de 0 a 107 km/h en 3.8 segundos.
ov_highlights_body.fr: Iron Rattler est l un des meilleurs coasters hybrides. Superman Krypton offre six inversions. Wonder Woman fut le premier coaster a rail unique. Poltergeist lance de 0 a 107 km/h.
ov_highlights_body.de: Iron Rattler ist einer der besten Hybrid-Coaster. Superman Krypton bietet sechs Inversionen. Wonder Woman war der erste Single-Rail-Coaster. Poltergeist beschleunigt von 0 auf 107 km/h.
ov_highlights_body.it: Iron Rattler e uno dei migliori coaster ibridi. Superman Krypton offre sei inversioni. Wonder Woman fu il primo coaster a rotaia singola. Poltergeist lancia da 0 a 107 km/h.
ov_highlights_body.nl: Iron Rattler is een van de beste hybride achtbanen. Superman Krypton biedt zes inversies. Wonder Woman was de eerste single-rail achtbaan. Poltergeist versnelt van 0 tot 107 km/u.
ov_highlights_body.pt: Iron Rattler e um dos melhores coasters hibridos. Superman Krypton oferece seis inversoes. Wonder Woman foi o primeiro coaster de carril unico. Poltergeist acelera de 0 a 107 km/h.
ov_highlights_body.ru: Iron Rattler — один из лучших гибридных. Wonder Woman — первый single-rail.
ov_highlights_body.zh: Iron Rattler是全球最佳混合过山车之一。Superman Krypton提供六个倒挂。Wonder Woman是第一辆单轨过山车。
ov_highlights_body.ar: Iron Rattler من أفضل الهجينة. Superman Krypton ستة تقلبات. Wonder Woman أول single-rail.

ov_did_you_know_body.en: Six Flags Fiesta Texas opened in 1992 on the site of a former limestone quarry. Iron Rattler opened in 2013 as a conversion of the original Rattler wooden coaster. Wonder Woman Golden Lasso Coaster opened in 2018 as the worlds first single-rail coaster. The quarry walls reach up to 30 metres high and form a unique natural amphitheater.
ov_did_you_know_body.es: Abrio en 1992 en el sitio de una antigua cantera. Iron Rattler abrio en 2013. Wonder Woman abrio en 2018 como el primer coaster de riel unico del mundo.
ov_did_you_know_body.fr: A ouvert en 1992 sur une ancienne carriere. Iron Rattler en 2013. Wonder Woman en 2018 premier coaster a rail unique au monde.
ov_did_you_know_body.de: Eroffnete 1992 auf einem ehemaligen Steinbruch. Iron Rattler 2013. Wonder Woman 2018 erster Single-Rail der Welt.
ov_did_you_know_body.it: Aperto nel 1992 su una ex cava. Iron Rattler 2013. Wonder Woman 2018 primo single-rail al mondo.
ov_did_you_know_body.nl: Geopend in 1992 op een voormalige groeve. Iron Rattler 2013. Wonder Woman 2018 eerste single-rail ter wereld.
ov_did_you_know_body.pt: Abriu em 1992 numa antiga pedreira. Iron Rattler 2013. Wonder Woman 2018 primeiro single-rail do mundo.
ov_did_you_know_body.ru: Открылся в 1992 г. Iron Rattler 2013. Wonder Woman 2018 — первый single-rail.
ov_did_you_know_body.zh: 山姆尔希拉1992年开放。Iron Rattler 2013年开放。Wonder Woman 2018年开放，全球首座单轨过山车。
ov_did_you_know_body.ar: افتتح 1992. Iron Rattler 2013. Wonder Woman 2018 أول single-rail.

ov_plan_body.en: Arrive at opening and head straight to Iron Rattler. Superman Krypton second and Wonder Woman third. Flash Pass is strongly recommended. Sky Screamer at sunset for extraordinary views. The park is busiest on summer weekends and Texas school holidays.
ov_plan_body.es: Llega a la apertura y ve directamente a Iron Rattler. Flash Pass muy recomendado. Sky Screamer al atardecer para vistas extraordinarias.
ov_plan_body.fr: Arrivez a l ouverture et allez a Iron Rattler. Flash Pass fortement recommande. Sky Screamer au coucher du soleil.
ov_plan_body.de: Kommen Sie zur Eroffnung und gehen Sie zu Iron Rattler. Flash Pass dringend empfohlen. Sky Screamer bei Sonnenuntergang.
ov_plan_body.it: Arriva e vai a Iron Rattler. Flash Pass fortemente consigliato. Sky Screamer al tramonto.
ov_plan_body.nl: Kom bij opening naar Iron Rattler. Flash Pass sterk aanbevolen. Sky Screamer bij zonsondergang.
ov_plan_body.pt: Chega na abertura e vai a Iron Rattler. Flash Pass recomendado. Sky Screamer ao por do sol.
ov_plan_body.ru: Приходите к открытию. Iron Rattler — первым. Flash Pass рекомендуется.
ov_plan_body.zh: 开园时到达直接前往Iron Rattler。建议Flash Pass。日落时乘坐Sky Screamer欣赏全景。
ov_plan_body.ar: اذهب مباشرة لـ Iron Rattler. Flash Pass موصى به.

ov_photos_body.en: Iron Rattler photographed from below showing the beyond-vertical drop into the quarry wall is the defining image. Superman Krypton against the limestone walls is extraordinary. Sky Screamer at sunset with San Antonio skyline is breathtaking.
ov_photos_body.es: Iron Rattler desde abajo mostrando la caida es la imagen definitiva. Superman Krypton contra las paredes de caliza es extraordinario. Sky Screamer al atardecer es impresionante.
ov_photos_body.fr: Iron Rattler depuis le bas est l image definitive. Superman Krypton contre les parois calcaires est extraordinaire. Sky Screamer au coucher du soleil est impressionnant.
ov_photos_body.de: Iron Rattler von unten ist das definitive Bild. Superman Krypton gegen die Kalkwande ist aussergewohnlich. Sky Screamer bei Sonnenuntergang ist atemberaubend.
ov_photos_body.it: Iron Rattler dal basso e l immagine definitiva. Superman Krypton contro le pareti calcaree e straordinario. Sky Screamer al tramonto e mozzafiato.
ov_photos_body.nl: Iron Rattler van onderaf is het definitieve beeld. Superman Krypton tegen de kalkwanden is buitengewoon. Sky Screamer bij zonsondergang is adembenemend.
ov_photos_body.pt: Iron Rattler de baixo e a imagem definitiva. Superman Krypton contra as paredes calcarias e extraordinario. Sky Screamer ao por do sol e de tirar o folego.
ov_photos_body.zh: Iron Rattler从下方拍摄是标志性影像。
ov_photos_body.ar: Iron Rattler من الأسفل هو الصورة المحددة.
